_meta.title: Bitcoin (BTC) Price Predictions 2025-2030
_meta.description: Aggregated BTC price forecasts from crypto prediction platforms and major institutional sources
_meta.disclaimer: All predictions are speculative and should not be treated as financial advice. Prices in USD.
_meta.notes: Some sources use algorithmic/machine-learning models; others are analyst-driven. Where exact min/max/avg were not available, year-end or range targets are provided instead.

crypto_platform_predictions.methodology: Algorithmic model based on historical data and technical analysis

2025.notes: Page blocked (403). See search-derived data below.

crypto_platform_predictions.methodology: Technical analysis and historical price trajectory modeling

2025.notes: BTC reached ATH of $126,198 in Oct 2025, closed year near $87,000

crypto_platform_predictions.methodology: Technical analysis and expert analyst forecasting

2025.notes: Bullish target of $200K by end of 2025

2026.notes: Specific 2026 figures not extracted; page rendered via JS

crypto_platform_predictions.methodology: Weekly updated forecast combining technical and fundamental analysis

2026.notes: Feb 2026 price hovering $66K-$70K after decline from $87K support

institutional_predictions.analyst: Geoff Kendrick (Head of Digital Assets Research)
institutional_predictions.methodology: Macro-driven institutional research, ETF flow modeling
institutional_predictions.notes: Revised down from earlier bullish forecasts in Dec 2025. Originally had $200K for 2025, $300K for 2026, $400K for 2027, $500K for 2028.

2026.notes: Revised from $300,000 (Dec 2025), further cut to $100K in Feb 2026

institutional_predictions.methodology: Bottom-up adoption modeling, digital gold thesis, TAM analysis
institutional_predictions.notes: ARK projects total crypto market cap at $28T by 2030, with BTC at ~70% ($16T market cap). Bull case raised from $1.5M to $2.4M.

2026.notes: No specific 2026 target published; expects 'Goldilocks year'

institutional_predictions.methodology: Institutional capital flow analysis, cycle modeling
institutional_predictions.notes: Believes Bitcoin is in an 'elongated bull cycle' breaking the traditional 4-year pattern. Revised 2026 target down from $300K to $150K.

institutional_predictions.methodology: Gold-parity model, production-cost analysis, risk-capital comparison
institutional_predictions.notes: Fair value model based on bitcoin-to-gold volatility ratio. $266K is theoretical gold-parity endpoint, described as 'unrealistic' near-term by analysts themselves.

2025.notes: Fair value based on gold-parity model

2026.notes: Expects new ATH in 2026 driven by CLARITY Act and institutional capital

theoretical_gold_parity.notes: Mathematical gold-parity endpoint, not a time-bound prediction

institutional_predictions.methodology: Scenario-based analysis tied to Fed rate cuts and regulatory easing
institutional_predictions.notes: Not a firm target but a scenario-based projection under favorable economic conditions.

2026.notes: Scenario-based, conditional on Fed rate cuts and regulatory easing

institutional_predictions.analyst: Matthew Sigel (Head of Digital Assets Research) / David Schassler
institutional_predictions.methodology: Offshore wealth market penetration analysis, halving cycle modeling
institutional_predictions.notes: Targets $180K via 10% penetration of $12T offshore wealth market. Expects consolidation rather than melt-up in 2026.

2026.notes: Expects new ATH but frames 2026 as consolidation, not dramatic regime shift

2030.notes: Base case; sees long-term possibility of $1M

institutional_predictions.methodology: ETF demand analysis, institutional capital flow modeling
institutional_predictions.notes: Lee argues 4-year cycle is breaking down due to ETF-driven demand. Internal Fundstrat bearish scenario warns of possible $60K. Public forecast is bullish.

2025.notes: Original target, not met; BTC closed ~$87K

institutional_predictions.methodology: Halving cycle extrapolation, 88% average annual growth rate model
institutional_predictions.notes: Pantera's Bitcoin Fund achieved 131,165% lifetime return. Accurately predicted $117,482 by Aug 2025. Projects $15T BTC market cap by 2028.

2025.notes: Accurately predicted; BTC hit $119K+ on target date

2028.notes: Based on halving cycle and 88% avg annual growth

institutional_predictions.notes: Novogratz has been consistently bullish long-term but cautious near-term. Declared 'age of speculation' may be over in Feb 2026.

2026.notes: Near-term target $130K-$150K, contingent on sustaining above $100K

2030.notes: Long-term target; expects BTC to replace gold as top store of value

institutional_predictions.methodology: ETF inflow modeling, institutional adoption analysis
institutional_predictions.notes: Hougan noted unexpected selling pressure at $100K. Long-term thesis based on ETF and corporate treasury demand locking up ~12% of supply.

2030.notes: If ETF and corporate buyer demand accelerates; challenges gold market cap

institutional_predictions.notes: BEARISH outlier among institutions. Believes BTC is in 'autumn' phase of 4-year cycle with 'winter' approaching. Filed for spot BTC ETF despite bearish price view.

2025.notes: Advised locking in profits; cycle nearing end

2026.notes: Bearish; expects cycle downturn. No specific price target published.

summary_consensus.description: Aggregated consensus ranges across all sources

2025.notes: Actual: BTC hit ATH of ~$126K in Oct 2025, closed year near $87K

2026.notes: Most institutional targets cluster $100K-$200K. Feb 2026 BTC trading ~$66K-$70K after sharp correction.

2027.notes: Wide range reflects uncertainty. Bernstein expects cycle peak at $200K. Standard Chartered targets $225K.

2028.notes: Next halving expected in 2028. Pantera targets $740K. Standard Chartered targets $300K.

2029.notes: Post-halving momentum year. Most sources see $300K-$500K range.

2030.notes: Extreme variance. ARK bull case $2.4M. Standard Chartered $500K. Most cluster $500K-$1M. Several sources see potential for $1M+.

key_catalysts: Spot Bitcoin ETF inflows and corporate treasury adoption (12%+ of supply locked up)
2028 Bitcoin halving reducing block reward to 1.5625 BTC
US regulatory clarity (CLARITY Act, stablecoin legislation)
Bitcoin as digital gold narrative vs $6.2T private gold investment
Institutional brokerage and retirement account access via ETFs
key_risks: Stablecoin competition reducing BTC safe-haven demand in emerging markets
Black swan events (exchange failures, protocol vulnerabilities)
Correlation with tech stocks during risk-off periods
